---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new feature or improvement
labels: enhancement
---

## What do you want to add or change?
<!-- Clear description -->

## Which domain(s) does this touch?
- [ ] Core / Architecture
- [ ] Levels
- [ ] Art / Assets
- [ ] Audio
- [ ] Cross-domain

## Why?
<!-- What problem does this solve or what value does it add? -->

## Rough design / approach
<!-- Optional: sketch out how it could work -->

## Dependencies
<!-- Does this require work from another domain first? -->

## Priority
- [ ] Blocking other work
- [ ] High
- [ ] Medium / Nice to have
